home.description:
I’m a software development student with hands-on experience building web applications and working on real-world projects as an outsource developer.
 I focus on building maintainable and scalable systems, system design, and writing technical documentation.
 Always curious to break complex problems into structured, expandable solutions.
home.name: Panachon Kumnuengpanadon

about.title: About Me
about.description: I’m a software development student with hands-on experience building web applications and working on real-world projects as an outsource developer. I have experience working with modern web technologies, focusing on building maintainable and scalable systems. My work includes collaborating within development teams, implementing features, and solving practical issues in production environments. Recently, I’ve been focusing on system design, system analysis, and writing technical documentation (TARB, PRD, SPEC). I enjoy breaking complex problems into small parts, identifying strengths and weaknesses, and creating structured solutions that are easy to maintain and expand.

myWork.title: My Work
myWork.softinter-period: May 2024 – Apr 2025 · 1 yr · Chiang Mai, Thailand (Hybrid)
myWork.softinter-desc: Developed an ERP web application using Angular and ASP.NET. Designed and generated reports using Jaspersoft. Managed and monitored databases using DBeaver. Collaborated with the development team to design and enhance the system in alignment with business requirements.
myWork.certificate-vocational: National Vocational Skills Competition in Network Technology (Higher Vocational Level)

projects.title: My Projects
projects.description-lantong: Lan Thong Chiang Mai Limited Partnership operates an online sidecar (motorcycle attachment) sales website. It also features a backend management system and a customer shop review system.
projects.description-ai-resume: AI Resume, using user data to create a resume suitable for the desired job position.
projects.description-weather-station: Weather checking website for Chiang Mai Technical College using the Meteorological Department's dataset and a Random Forest Model to predict tomorrow's weather conditions.
projects.description-e-commerce: E-commerce website developed using Next.js It includes a backend management system and a shopping cart system.
projects.description-weather-hub: Weather Hub is a web application that provides real-time weather updates and forecasts for various locations using data from reliable Open-Meteo.
